hook: The right kind of selectiveness makes you calmer, not colder.
body: You can stay open-hearted while still filtering for reciprocity, maturity, and shared values.

hook: Some men react to bad experiences by becoming cynical when what they actually needed was better standards.
body: Standards are a form of direction, not a performance of superiority.
